description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure dressed in urban streetwear, featuring a cropped jacket with a hood, fitted pants with distressed details, and a mask covering the face. The figure's hands are exposed, and the arms are slightly bent at the elbows, giving a relaxed yet alert posture. The head is covered with a hood, and the face is obscured by a dark mask, adding an element of anonymity. The outfit includes a belt with metallic accents and sturdy boots, suitable for walking in an urban environment. The overall build is slender and athletic, with visible articulation at the joints. The clothing and accessories suggest a modern, possibly edgy or alternative fashion sense.
description: A masked adult in urban streetwear with a hooded cropped jacket, fitted pants, and boots, standing in a relaxed pose. The figure has a slender build and an athletic stance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the masked face, hooded jacket, exposed midriff, and detailed belt and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, arm, and the fitted nature of the pants and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the cropped jacket, hood, and the fitted pants with visible seam and pocket details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the hood, arm, and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a cropped hooded jacket, fitted distressed pants, and a face mask
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly bent
attribute_hairstyle: short hair covered by a hood
